property.name: diagramTitle
property.label: Title
property.placeholder: Enter an optional title for this score display

property.name: showTitle
property.label: Show Title
property.description: Show or hide the title for this score component

property.name: scoreSize
property.label: Font Size
property.description: Font size for the score display
property.datasource: XX-Small, X-Small, Small, Medium, Large, X-Large, XX-Large, XXX-Large, Huge

property.name: scoreBold
property.label: Bold
property.description: Font weight of the score display

property.name: scoreColor
property.label: Color
property.datasource: Black, Gray, Silver, Green, Lime, Red, Maroon, Orange, Yellow, Fuchsia, Aqua, Blue, Navy, Olive, Purple, Teal
